# Travel Ideas

Working list of places we'd consider for the September trip.

- [[Barcelona]] — Gaudí pilgrimage, beaches.
- [[Lisbon]] — slower pace, trams.

## Asia

- [[Tokyo]] — repeat visit, Teamlab in Toyosu.
